shared_categories.label: Confidential Data Exposure
shared_categories.description: Sensitive or confidential information may have been included in a request or response.

shared_categories.label: Prompt Injection or Manipulation
shared_categories.description: An input may be attempting to override instructions or manipulate the system.

shared_categories.label: Policy Violation
shared_categories.description: A request or response violated configured AI rules.

shared_categories.label: Provider Misuse
shared_categories.description: An unapproved provider, model, or routing behavior was requested.

shared_categories.label: Approval Required
shared_categories.description: The action should not proceed without explicit approval or additional review.

shared_categories.label: Auditability Gap
shared_categories.description: Required metadata, traceability, or record integrity details were missing.
